nasb.text: As a jeweler engraves a signet, you shall engrave the two stones according to the names of the sons of Israel; you shall set them in filigree settings of gold.

esv.text: As a jeweler engraves signets, so shall you engrave the two stones with the names of the sons of Israel. You shall enclose them in settings of gold filigree.

cnv.text: 好像寶石雕刻匠刻印章一樣，你要把以色列眾子的名字刻在這兩塊寶石上，要把它們鑲嵌在金槽中。

ccb.text: 要用工匠雕刻图章的方法将他们的名字刻在两块宝石上，把宝石镶在两个金框里面。
